name: application
description: Global cross-tenant registry of Academorix products (Sports, Marketplace, Ticketing, Venue, Education) plus the BusinessType catalogue (academy, gym, school, federation, club, ...). Both entities are tenant-agnostic (tenant_id=null always) and are consumed by every tenant-scoped module through the BelongsToApplication trait (owned here) + the applicable() migration macro. Extracted from tenants at v0.3 to give Application its own lifecycle — a product-catalogue mutation should never require a tenancy service redeploy.

central.description: Public product discovery: which Applications exist + basic metadata.

platform-admin.description: Academorix staff surface. Full CRUD over Application + BusinessType. URL-prefixed with `/platform/` to disambiguate from the central-host public read endpoints on the same aggregates — auth middleware (`auth:platform_admin`) enforces the audience separately.
